mapper.insert: insert into setmeal ( category_id, name, price, status, description, image,update_time,update_user,create_time,create_user) VALUES (#{categoryId},#{name},#{price},#{status},#{description},#{image},#{updateTime},#{updateUser},#{createTime},#{createUser})

insert into setmeal_dish ( setmeal_id, dish_id, name, price, copies) values
(#{dish.setmealId},#{dish.dishId},#{dish.name},#{dish.price},#{dish.copies})
mapper.update:
update setmeal
category_id = #{categoryId},
name = #{name},
price = #{price},
image = #{image},
description = #{description},
status = #{status},
update_time =#{updateTime},update_user =#{updateUser}, where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE from setmeal_dish WHERE setmeal_id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select SUM(status) from setmeal where id in #{id}
